'''Aether Hypernautics''' was a company based on the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core World]] of [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]].<ref name="FOP" /> The company pushed academic [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] research into the realm of applied science in an effort to create better, safer, faster, and more efficient hyperspace propulsion systems.<ref name="ITCW" /> It manufactured [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrives]] and supplied military-grade hyperdrives to the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. Aether Hypernautics was a contractor and subcontractor for many classified [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]] projects and worked closely with [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]]. The company's [[hypernautics]] research was focused on attempting to produce a .1 military [[Hyperdrive motivator/Legends|hyperdrive motivator]],<ref name="FOP" /> which made them one of the companies that competed to design the fastest engine in existence.<ref name="ITCW" />
